title: MedinovAI Model Risk Register
description: Living inventory of every deployed AI/ML model with impact classification and mitigation plans. Governance control GOV-01.

register_version.description: Schema version of this register file.

last_updated.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last update to this register.

reviewed_by.description: Name or role of the person who last reviewed this register.

next_review_date.description: Date of the next scheduled quarterly review.

model_id.description: Unique model identifier. Format: MDL-<ALPHANUMERIC>. Example: MDL-CDS001.

vendor.description: Vendor name if third-party model. 'internal' for in-house models.

vendor_contract_ref.description: Reference to vendor accountability terms document (if third-party). See GOV-08.

purpose.description: What the model does in plain language.

clinical_use.description: True if the model directly or indirectly affects patient care or clinical decisions.

risk_class.description: Risk classification based on patient safety impact, clinical decision impact, and regulatory exposure. low: administrative/internal only. medium: affects workflow but not clinical decisions. high: informs clinical decisions. critical: directly drives treatment or diagnosis.

patient_safety.description: none: no patient impact. indirect: affects workflows that affect patients. direct: directly influences treatment/diagnosis.

clinical_decision.description: none: not used in decisions. advisory: provides recommendations. deterministic: drives automated decisions.

regulatory_exposure.description: Degree of regulatory scrutiny this model is subject to.

data_sensitivity.description: Sensitivity level of data consumed by this model.

data_types_consumed.description: Types of data the model consumes. Examples: 'patient_demographics', 'lab_results', 'imaging', 'free_text_notes', 'medication_orders'.

deployment_environment.description: Where the model is deployed. Examples: 'medinovai-cds', 'medinovai-pathology-ai'.

mitigation_plan.description: Risk mitigation measures in place for this model.

fallback_mechanism.description: What happens when the model fails or is quarantined. Examples: 'rule-based fallback', 'human decision', 'cached last-good response'.

monitoring_checks.description: List of heartbeat checks monitoring this model.

bias_testing_schedule.description: How often bias testing is performed. Examples: 'every-deployment', 'quarterly', 'monthly'.

human_override_enabled.description: Whether clinicians can override this model's outputs.

max_acceptable_drift_pct.description: Maximum acceptable accuracy drift percentage before auto-disable.

explainability_tier.description: Required explainability tier per GOV-05. Must match or exceed risk_class.

owner.description: Team or individual responsible for this model.

last_validated.description: Date of the last successful validation pipeline run.

last_bias_audit.description: Date of the last bias testing audit.

next_review_date.description: Date of the next scheduled review.

governance_notes.description: Free-text notes from governance board reviews.

created_at.description: When this model was first registered.

updated_at.description: When this registry entry was last updated.
